book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.cra:
Як і кування орнаменту обладунків «Дикість», покращення [шкіряних кінських обладунків](item://minecraft:leather_horse_armor) —
 це послуга, що надається [#](AA00AA)дикими духами[#]() і не прив’язує жодного духа до результату.
 Ви приносите жертву речами, а [#](AA00AA)дикі духи[#]() використовують свої сили, щоби викувати з них відповідний предмет.
 Використайте відповідні матеріали, щоб отримати [мідні кінські обладунки](item://minecraft:copper_horse_armor),
 [залізні кінські обладунки](item://minecraft:iron_horse_armor), [золоті кінські обладунки](item://minecraft:golden_horse_armor)
 або [діамантові кінські обладунки](item://minecraft:diamond_horse_armor).

Ще один трюк з [#](AA00AA)дикими духами[#]() полягає у трансформації кінських обладунків у відповідні обладунки навтилуса.
 Однак незеритові обладунки не можуть бути отримані таким чином,
 вам прийдеться виконати ритуал із діамантовими обладунками, а вже після покращити їх.

Ритуальна сумка може уміщувати предмети, необхідні для створення ритуальних кіл.
Предмети, що мають міцність, використовуватимуться допоки мають понад 1 очка міцности, а після втратять зачарований блиск.
Усі інші предмети не можуть бути покладені у сумку.
\
Сумка прискорює процес створення кіл, автоматично обираючи правильні предмети, що дозволяє не вибирати вручну крейди, свічки та інші предмети для розміщення.

Ритуальна сумка також здатна зберігати вашу [щітку для крейди](item://occultism:brush).
Збережена щітка буде обиратися та використовуватися автоматично, коли ви клацаєте [#](55FF55)ПКМ[#]() по гліфах.
Втомилися від купи крейди та іншої атрибутики? Ритуальна сумка — ось ваше рішення!

На перший погляд, сумка здається звичайним мішком помірного розміру та місткості. Однак, при детальнішому розгляді видається, що до сумки прив’язаний [#](AA00AA)Фоліот[#](), завдання якого — допомогти викликачеві вимальовувати кола для своїх ритуалів.

1. [#](55FF55)Застосуйте крадькома[#](), щоб відкрити сумку та покласти у неї крейду, свічі, кристали, черепи та інші предмети, необхідні в ритуалах.
2. Використовуючи книгу, клацніть на іконку «ока», щоби створити наміток кола, яке ви хочете сформувати.
3. [#](55FF55)Клацніть ПКМ[#]() книгою, щоб розмістити наміток в потрібному місці.
4. [#](55FF55)Застосовуйте[#]() сумку на візуалізованих елементах кола, щоб автоматично розміщувати їх.
5. Продовжуйте, поки успішно не сформуєте коло.

Ритуальна сумка може уміщувати предмети, необхідні для створення ритуальних кіл.
Предмети, що мають міцність, використовуватимуться допоки мають понад 1 очка міцности, а після втратять зачарований блиск.
Усі інші предмети не можуть бути покладені у сумку.
\
Сумка здатна миттєво встановити коло цілком, якщо має усі необхідні предмети.\
Вона також може прибирати (завершені) кола [#](55FF55)клацанням ПКМ[#]() по [золотій жертовній чаші](item://occultism:golden_sacrificial_bowl), та забирати усі блоки назад у сумку.

Ритуальна сумка також здатна зберігати вашу [щітку для крейди](item://occultism:brush).
Збережена щітка буде обиратися та використовуватися автоматично, коли ви клацаєте [#](55FF55)ПКМ[#]() по гліфах.
Ритуальна сумка учня надто повільна? Звернімося до Афріта!

Сумка ремісника застосовує [#](AA00AA)Афріта[#](), щоб допомогти викликачеві формувати кола для його ритуалів. На відміну від [#](AA00AA)Фоліота[#]() у сумці учня, прив’язаний [#](AA00AA)Афріт[#]() може встановити усе коло однією дією.

На додаток дух також може очистити коло після завершення ритуалу, не залишаючи жодних його слідів.
You can use this alternative recipe to upgrade the [](item://occultism:ritual_satchel_t1), keeping the items inside!

1. Find a pentacle you want to remove. The pentacle needs to be intact (ready for a ritual).
2. [#](55FF55)Right-Click[#]() the central [](item://occultism:golden_sacrificial_bowl) with the satchel.
2. The satchel will remove all chalk marks, and pick up all paraphernalia blocks, such as candles or skulls, used in the pentacle.

1. [#](55FF55)Застосуйте крадькома[#](), щоб відкрити сумку та покласти у неї крейду, свічі, кристали, черепи та інші предмети, необхідні в ритуалах.
2. Використовуючи книгу, клацніть на іконку «ока», щоби створити наміток кола, яке ви хочете сформувати.
3. [#](55FF55)Клацніть ПКМ[#]() книгою, щоб розмістити наміток в потрібному місці.
4. [#](55FF55)Застосуйте[#]() сумку на візуалізованих елементах кола, щоб автоматично розмістити усі візуалізовані блоки, якщо вони є в сумці.

Unlike other rituals, creating a [](item://minecraft:bee_nest) is a service provided by [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]()
and not bound any spirit to the final object. You sacrifice the items and the Wild Spirits
 uses his power to forge that item for you.

Unlike other rituals, creating a [](item://minecraft:bell) is a service provided by [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]()
and not bound any spirit to the final object. You sacrifice the items and the Wild Spirits
 uses his power to forge that item for you.

The [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() miner harvests ores, like djinni miners, and additionally
 mines harder ores. This miner is faster and more efficient
 than the djinnis, causing less damage to the magic lamp with each use.

By compressing [#](AA00AA)MMM[#]() you get an extremely powerful miner, but something starts watching you.
 [](item://occultism:mining_dim_core) are a extremely rarely mined by a Marid.

Unlike other rituals, creating a [](item://minecraft:budding_amethyst) is a service provided by [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]() and not bound any spirit to the
 final object. You sacrifice the items and the Wild Spirits uses his power to forge that item for you.

The dimensional matrix is the entry point to a small dimension used for storing items.
 A [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() bound to the matrix keeps the dimension stable, often supported by additional
 spirits in storage stabilizers, to increase the dimension size.

If you want to save your miners before they break, check "Server Configuration > Items".
 By setting the "Save miners before breaking" option to "on", a miner will go to the output
 of the dimensional mineshaft when it reaches 1 durability. The effects of enchantments can also be turned off.

You've noticed that your miner can be enchanted? Here's how effective it is!\
 **Efficiency:** Increase the progress bar by the smaller of two RNB;\
 **Fortune:** Mine a number of extra results equals smaller of three RNB;\
 **Silk touch:** Multiply the count of mined result by 1 plus a RNB;\
 RNB = random number between 0 and the enchantment level.

The **Unbreaking** and **Mending** enchantments function as vanilla.
\
 With other methods (mods) you can make your miner unusable (**unusing**)
 when it's close to breaking, or even truly unbreakable (**eternal**).

The dimensional mineshaft has two interactions with redstone:
 1. The spirit will stop working when receives a redstone signal;
 2. A comparator can be used to extract a signal based on occupied slots and lamp durability.
  Tip, if the comparator sends a power of 10, it is better to stop the operations.

The dimensional mineshaft houses a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() which opens up a stable connection into an
  uninhabited dimension, perfectly suited for mining. While the portal is too small
   to transfer humans, other spirits can use it to enter the mining dimension and bring back resources.

The [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() miner harvests most general ores. It is able to mine faster and more efficiently.
 The greater power of the djinni it damages the magic lamp relatively quickly.

Dragonyst dust is the rarest and most powerful dust, used for
 the highest tier eldritch crafting. It is crafted using the
 essence of the [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() and requires extremely rare materials
 from the End.

Кування [надприродного келиха](item://occultism:eldritch_chalice) — це послуга, що надається [#](AA00AA)надприродними духами[#](); цей блок допоможе
 окультним майстрам скоротити час, миттєво виконуючи будь-який ритуал.\
 В усьому іншому працює як золота чи ієснієва ритуальні чаші.

Familiar Rings consist of a [](item://occultism:soul_gem), that contains a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#](), mounted on a ring.
 The [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() in the ring allows the familiar captured in the soul gem to apply effects to the wearer.

To use a [](item://occultism:familiar_ring), simply capture a summoned (and tamed) familiar by [#](AA00AA)right-clicking[#](),
 and then wear the ring as [#](AA00AA)Curio[#]() to make use of the effects the familiar provides.
\
\
When released from a familiar ring, the spirit will recognize the person releasing them as their new master.

Miner spirits use [](item://occultism:dimensional_mineshaft) to acquire resources from other dimensions.
 They are summoned and bound into magic lamps, which they can leave only through the mineshaft.
 The magic lamp degrades over time, once it breaks the spirit is released back to [#](AA00AA)The Other Place[#]().

To summon miner spirits, you first need to craft a [Magic Lamp](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/magic_lamps) to hold them.
 The key ingredient for that is [](item://occultism:spirit_attuned_gem).

The [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() miner harvests only resources considered more basic and less precious.
 The mining process is quite slow, due to this the Foliot expends only minor
 amounts of energy, damaging the lamp it is housed in slowly over time.

Gray Paste is a versatile crafting paste created with the help of [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#](). \
It can be used to convert various dusts back into their original items, \
effectively acting as a reverse crusher.

[](item://occultism:iesnium_sacrificial_bowl) злита з [#](AA00AA)Афрітом[#](),
 який допомагає досвідченим окультистам зберігати час,
 виконуючи будь-який ритуал за чверть від звичайного часу.
 В усьому іншому працює як золота ритуальна чаша.
For players who are on the path of otherrock, there is also the dark version.
When the Third Eye isn't enough

Otherworld ores usually can only be mined with Otherworld metal tools.
 The [](item://occultism:infused_pickaxe) is a makeshift solution to this Chicken-and-Egg problem.
 Brittle spirit attuned gems house a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() that allows harvesting the,
 but the durability is extremely low. A more durable version is the [Iesnium Pickaxe](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/iesnium_pickaxe).

The [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() miner is the most powerful miner spirit, it has the fasted mining speed and best magic lamp
 preservation. Unlike other miner spirits they also can mine the rarest ores, such as [](item://minecraft:ancient_debris) and [](item://occultism:iesnium_ore).

Forging the [](item://occultism:chalk_rainbow) is a service provided by an [#](AA00AA)Eldritch Spirit[#]().
This chalk can replace any chalk, with extra features.
1. Use a [](item://occultism:spirit_attuned_gem) to toggle the random color changes or
use any dye to set the color of glyph, items will not be consumed.
2. Use this chalk in a glyph while crouched will erase the glyph, acting as a [](item://occultism:brush).
3. Hold a dye in your other hand to define the color when placing the glyph.

Forging the [](item://occultism:chalk_void) is a service provided by an [#](AA00AA)Eldritch Spirit[#]().
This chalk has the same abilities as the [](item://occultism:chalk_rainbow)
 but the color flickering is white to black.

Nature Paste is an organic crafting paste created with the help of [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#](). \
Made from leaves, saplings, and seeds, it serves as a versatile \
natural crafting material.

The Goggles will, however, not give the ability to harvest otherworld materials.
 That means when wearing goggles, an [Infused Pick](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/infused_pickaxe), or even better, an [Iesnium Pick](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/iesnium_pickaxe) needs to be
 used to break blocks in order to obtain their Otherworld variants.

The [](item://occultism:otherworld_goggles) give the wearer permanent [#](AA00AA)Third Eye[#](), allowing to view even blocks hidden from those partaking of [Demon's Dream](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/demons_dream).
\
\
This elegantly solves the general issue of summoners being in a drugged haze, causing all sorts of havoc.

Summoning a spirit into the lenses used to craft goggles is one of the
 first of the more complex rituals apprentice summoners usually attempt,
 showing that their skills are progressing beyond the basics.

Otherworld Goggles make use of a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() bound into the lenses.
 The Foliot shares its ability to view higher planes with the wearer,
 thus allowing them to see Otherworld materials.

Unlike other rituals, creating a [](item://minecraft:reinforced_deepslate) is a service provided by [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]() and not bound any spirit to the
 final object. You sacrifice the items and the Wild Spirits uses his power to forge that item for you.

A [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() is bound to the satchel, tasked with **slightly** warping reality. This allows to store more
 items in the satchel than its size would indicate, making it a practical travellers companion.

Soul gems are diamonds set in precious metals, which are then infused with a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]().
 The spirit creates a small dimension that allows the temporary entrapment of living beings.
 Beings of great power or size cannot be stored, however.

To capture an entity, [#](AA00AA)right-click[#]() it with the soul gem. \
[#](AA00AA)right-click[#]() again to release the entity.
\
\
Bosses cannot be captured.

Forging the [](item://occultism:storage_controller_stabilized) is one service provide by [#](AA00AA)Eldritch Spirits[#](),
 this block will helps occult masters twist space, placing the stabilizers in the same
 position as the actuator in some extra-planar dimension invisible even to the best eyes.\
 By default this item receives two bonus stabilizer tier 5\
 Other external stabilizers do not affect this block.\
 The recipe keep items inside!

This simple storage stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 1 Stabilizer adds **64** item types and 512000 items storage capacity.

This improved stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 2 Stabilizer adds **128** item types and 1024000 items storage capacity.

This advanced stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 3 Stabilizer adds **256** item types and 2048000 items storage capacity.

This highly advanced storage stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 4 Stabilizer adds **512** item types and 4098000 items storage capacity.

The stable wormhole allows access to a dimensional matrix from a remote destination.
\
\
Shift-click a [](item://occultism:storage_controller) to link it, then place the wormhole in the world to use it as a remote access point.

Основа задіювача сховища змушує [#](AA00AA)Фоліота[#]() керувати
 взаємодією з речами у вимірній матриці сховища.

All inventory system blocks have a dark version,
 they function exactly like their counterpart.

The [](item://occultism:storage_remote) can be linked to a [](item://occultism:storage_controller) by shift-clicking.
 The [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() bound to the accessor will then be able to
 access items from the actuator even from across dimensions.

Occultism offers two storage solutions: the first is based on satchels, portable inventories with different functions depending on the type.
 Some are already obtainable, while others will require evolve in the mod first.

The second option is to follow the entries below that show the rituals related to the Magic Storage system.
 For full step-by-step instructions on building the storage system, see the [Magic Storage](category://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/storage) category.

Unlike other rituals, creating a [](item://minecraft:wild_armor_trim_smithing_template) is a service provided by [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]() and not bound any spirit to the
 final object. You sacrifice the items and the Wild Spirits uses his power to forge that item for you.
 \
 Other connected items also follow this same operating principle.
A powerful dust for dark rituals

Withertite dust is a powerful ingredient for dark rituals.
 It is crafted using the essence of the [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() and
 requires rare materials from the Nether.

As you know, weapons can be enchanted. Applying looting increases the amount of drops obtained.
  \
  Sharpness speeds up the process, though not as effectively as Smite, Bane of
  Arthropods, or Impaling when the mob is vulnerable to those enchantments.

The **Unbreaking** and **Mending** enchantments function as vanilla.
\
 With other methods (mods) you can make the weapon unusable (**unusing**)
 when it's close to breaking, or even truly unbreakable (**eternal**).

Spiritual fuel is used to clone the captured mob,
  allowing it to be defeated in order to obtain its loot.
  Some resources can be used: [](item://occultism:datura_seeds), [](item://occultism:datura), [](item://occultism:demons_dream_essence), [](item://occultism:otherworld_essence).
  \
  The higher the quality of the resource, the greater its value.
  A total value equal to the mob’s health is required to initiate the battle.

[](item://occultism:soul_gem) працює без додаткових змін — він продукує базовий дроп під час симуляції одержимих мобів.
  З використанням [крихкого самоцвіта душ](item://occultism:fragile_soul_gem) з’являється ймовірність невдачі.
  Нарешті, з використанням [самоцвіта триєдності](item://occultism:trinity_gem) покращується ефективність, яка дозволяє симулювати дроп
  одержимих мобів та босів, а також потроює дроп інших мобів.
  [](item://occultism:soul_shattered) не потребує духовного палива, але може бути втрачений у процесі.

The dimensional battlefield has two interactions with redstone:
  1. The spirit will stop working when receives a redstone signal;
  2. A comparator can be used to extract a signal based on occupied slots and weapon durability.
  Tip, if the comparator sends a power of 15, it is better to stop the operations.

The dimensional battlefield houses an [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() that opens a stable gateway
  to a combat arena, perfectly suited for epic battles. Although the
  portal is too small to transport humans, the afrit is able to pass
  through it, carrying a few items to farm mob drops within the dimension.

To activate the Dimensional Battlefield, you must supply:
  + A mob captured with [](item://occultism:soul_gem) (or one of its variants).
  + A weapon for the afrit to wield in combat.
  + A source of spiritual fuel, such as [](item://occultism:datura)

The dimensional extractor contains a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() that quickly collects
  resources generated by dimensional machines or worker spirits
  and transfers the results to an inventory below.

It's very simple to use: just place your machines/spirits on top of it
  and connect an inventory directly below that accepts items from the top side.
  \
  NOTE: If the inventory is full, the djinn will simply discard the excess items.

Additionally, using [#](AA00AA)Shift + Right-Click[#]() will bind the satchel to you,
 allowing to share your ender chest with any other player,
 making this a great way to send items over long distances to friends.

A [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() is bound to the ender satchel, tasked with **slightly** warping the space.
 This allows open your ender chest from anywhere, making it a practical traveller's companion.

If you hold the gem in your off-hand, it will change the pitch viewing angle.
 A six-pointed star in the center of the portal indicates the current setting:
+ Emerald -> Forward
+ Iron -> Tilted Down
+ Redstone -> Straight Down
+ Diamond -> Tilted Up
+ Gold -> Straight Up

Using a [](item://occultism:spirit_attuned_gem) will define the yaw viewing angle after teleportation.
An iesnium nugget will point to the set direction like a compass rose.

If the wormhole contains an [Vitality Compass](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals/vitality_compass), you can use a fishing rod to pull the linked
 entity into the portal, the hook needs to stop in the portal before you pull.

The [](item://occultism:entity_wormhole) is a mystical teleportation device maintained by a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#](),
 capable of instantly transporting living beings across vast distances. Once attuned,
 it creates a stable rift that creatures can step through, linking distant points as if
 they were side by side. The Djinni ensures the wormhole remains open and aligned,
 making it a reliable—though undeniably arcane—means of travel.
You can also choose the [](item://occultism:otherrock) version if you want.

Fragile Soul gems are eggs infused by a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#](). The spirit creates a small dimension
 that allows the temporary entrapment of living beings.
 Beings of great power or size cannot be stored, however. \
 Be careful, this item will break after transporting a creature.

To capture an entity, [#](55FF55)right-click[#]() it with the soul gem. \
[#](55FF55)Right-click[#]() again to release the entity.
\
\
Bosses cannot be captured.

This knife is an [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() infusion that enhances the butcher knife with iesnium,
 increasing its damage while preserving the tallow drop property.
 \
 Additionally, certain mobs may drop their heads, and attacks against spirits deal triple damage.

Knowledge Tablet is an item infused by a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#](). The spirit can hold a enormous
 quantity of experience points. Keeping safe and allowing giving XP to other players.

This item use is very simple: \
[#](55FF55)Right-Click[#]() will storage all of your experience points. \
[#](55FF55)Shift-Right-Click[#]() receive all stored points. \
\
NOTE: Sometimes, with big values, you can lost a small quantity of point due numerical approximations.

Binding rituals infuse spirits into items, where their powers are used for one specific purpose.
 The created items can act like simple empowering enchantments, or fulfill complex tasks to aid the summoner.

With simple materials, a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() can repair any chalk for you.
 By evolving in the occult path, an [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() can repair miners, tools and armors.
 Any item repaired in this way retains its properties.

This extremely advanced stabilizer maybe is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Ancient Spirit[#]() that supports
 the dimensional matrix in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store even more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 5 Stabilizer adds **1024** item types and 8196000 items storage capacity.

Forging the [](item://occultism:trinity_gem) is a service provided by an [#](AA00AA)Eldritch Spirit[#]().
This gem is upgraded version of [](item://occultism:soul_gem) created with
3 distinct essences, 3 powerful dusts and 3 iesnium dusts.
The trinity gem has an empty entity blacklist (by default).

The [](item://occultism:true_sight_staff) employs an [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() to assist the summoner in tasks of finding and interacting with the otherworld.
 Unlike [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() in the otherworld goggles, which can only provide vision, with this staff in the off-hand or curio slot, the occultist can collect otherworld materials.
 The divining rods search abilities receive an upgrade, now is possible locate any block.

By creating, seeing, and finally holding this item, you feel for the first time in
 your occultism journey a brief connection with [#](AA00AA)Celestial[#]() forces, perhaps wonderful things can happen.

During eldritch mining, some [](item://occultism:bedrock_scrap) are found. Through an ancient ritual,
 powerful spirits can inlay jewels to forge a [](item://occultism:bedrock_gem_cluster).
 This is a legendary item for turning ordinary items into unbreakable ones.

The [](item://occultism:vitality_compass) is a mystical tool infused with a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]()
 that allows it to be attuned to the essence of living beings.
 By right-clicking on a creature, you bind its life force to the compass,
 allowing the needle to always point toward its location no matter the distance (while loaded).
book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.fam:
The Demonic Partner - a Husband or Wife - can fight for you and split your household chores.
\
\
Right-Click with any cookable food and they will use their magic to cook it.
\
\
Right-Click with a potion to get the effect for a significantly longer time,
 instant potions will be two levels stronger.

Magicians practicing the occult are a diverse crowd, coming from all creeds and all corners of the world. However one thing unites them all - they are as lonely as any human without a partner.
\
\
Of course being a magician, the dating pool is larger than for most people, meeting all kinds of otherworldly beings, besides humans.

As beings of immense powers Demons can have it all ... even love.\
In rare cases a Demon is so impressed by a mortal that they stay in touch. And in even rarer cases, take them on a date. And in such cases, the most unlikely thing can happen - love between a Spirit and a mortal.

Demons, of course, like to deal in contracts, and what better contract than a marriage contract?\
Beware however, Spirits are all about commitment, so this is a permanent bond.

The Demonic Partner Chapter is part of the Familiar Category of this book because of the similarities, however a Partner is obviously not a familiar.
\
\
As such, they also cannot be stored in a [](item://occultism:familiar_ring). You can, however, use a [](item://occultism:soul_gem) as for any other being.

A great partner gift is the [](item://occultism:sweet_honey_heart). To get this item, simply give a [](item://occultism:cursed_honey) to your husband or wife.
\
\
Note: This action has a cooldown of 10 minutes.

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, the bat familiar will give a life steal effect to it's master.

The Beaver familiar will chop down nearby trees when they grow from a sapling into a tree. It can only handle small trees.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
Gives free snacks when right-clicked with an empty hand.

The Beholder familiar highlights nearby entities with a glow effect, and shoots laser rays at enemies. It **eats** (poor) **Shub Niggurath babies** to gain temporary damage and speed.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it give it's master immunity to blindness, and after highlighting a Warden, the immunity extends to darkness.

Whenever the player picks up stone, there is a chance for the blacksmith familiar to repair their equipment a little bit.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**: \
Cannot be upgraded, but upgrades other Familiars.

To upgrade other familiars the blacksmith needs to be given iron ingots or blocks by [#](ad03fc)right-clicking[#]() it.
\
When the blacksmith upgrades a familiar, a message appears in the action bar, an anvil sound is emitted, and a star appears at the end of the familiar's name.
\
Upgraded familiars provide additional effects.

The chimera familiar can be fed (any) meat to grow, when growing it will gain damage and speed. Once it has grown big enough, players can ride it. When feeding it a [](item://minecraft:golden_apple) the [#](ad03fc)Goat[#]() will detach and become a separate familiar.
\
\
The detached goat familiar can be used to obtain the [Shub Niggurath](entry://familiar_rituals/familiar_shub_niggurath) familiar.

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, the goat familiar will get a warning bell. When you hit the familiar it will ring the bell and attract enemies in a large radius.

Give a [](item://minecraft:lapis_lazuli) to transform in a [](item://minecraft:prismarine_shard).\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it will act as a mobile light source.\
You receive more prismarine per lapis.

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, will increase the step assist and it will attack nearby enemies with a hammer. Yep, a **hammer**.

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
Enchants a Golden Apple or a Golden Dragon's Dream Fruit when right-click, but has large time interval.

Greedy familiars can ride on dragon familiars, giving the dragon the greedy effects additionally.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it will throw swords at nearby enemies.

The Fairy familiar **keeps other familiars from dying** (with cooldown), helps out other familiars with **beneficial effects** and **drains the life force of enemies** to assist their master.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
Allow getting Dragon's Breath when right-clicked with a glass bottle.
**Provides**: [#](ad03fc)Assists Familiars[#](), [#](ad03fc)Prevents Familiar Deaths[#](), [#](ad03fc)Drains Enemy Life Force[#]()

The greedy familiar is a Foliot that will pick up nearby items for it's master. When captured in a familiar ring it increased the pick-up range of the wearer.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it can find blocks for its master. [#](ad03fc)Right-click[#]() it with a block to tell it what to look for.

The guardian familiar sacrifices a limb everytime it's master is about to die and thus **prevents the death**. Once the guardian dies, the player is no longer protected. When summoned, the guardian spawns with a **random amount of limbs**, there is no guarantee that a complete guardian is summoned.

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it regains a limb.

Безголова щуролюдина-фамільяр краде голови мобів, що знаходяться поруч із ним, коли їх вбивають. Після цього він надає посилення шкоди проти цього типу мобів для свого хазяїна. Якщо здоров'я щуролюдини падає **нижче 50%**, вона гине, але потім хазяїн може відбудувати її, давши їй [пшеницю](item://minecraft:wheat), [палицю](item://minecraft:stick), [б](item://minecraft:hay_block) and a [](item://minecraft:carved_pumpkin).

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it will give weakness to nearby mobs of the type it stole the head from. And the owner will not make the Enderman angry by looking into his eyes.

The Mummy familiar is a martial arts expert and fights to protect their master.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it the familiar will deal even more damage and double the dodge chance.

[#](ad03fc)Drikwings[#]() are a subclass of [#](ad03fc)Djinni[#]() that are known to be amicable towards humans. They usually take the shape of a dark blue and purple parrot. Drikwings will provide their owner with limited flight abilities when nearby.
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
Increase number of jumps and change the slow fall to immunity to fall damage.

To obtain the parrot or parrot familiar for the sacrifice, consider summoning them using either the [Wild Parrot Ritual](entry://possession_rituals/possess_unbound_parrot) or [Parrot Familiar Ritual](entry://familiar_rituals/familiar_parrot)
\
\
**Hint:** If you use mods that protect pets from death, use the wild parrot ritual!

In this ritual a [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() is summoned **as a familiar**, the slaughter of a [#](ad03fc)Chicken[#]() and the offering of dyes are intended to entice the [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() to take the shape of a parrot.\
As [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() are not among the smartest spirits, they sometimes misunderstand the instructions ...

*This means, if a [#](ad03fc)Chicken[#]() is spawned, that's not a bug, just bad luck!*
\
\
**Upgrade Behaviour**\
Cannot be upgraded by the blacksmith familiar.

**Upgrade Behaviour**\
When upgraded by a blacksmith familiar, it will get a warning bell. When you hit the familiar it will ring the bell and **attract enemies** in a large radius.
**Provides**: [#](ad03fc)Spawns small versions of itself to fight for you.[#]()

The [#](ad03fc)Shub Niggurath[#]() is not summoned directly. First, summon a [Chimera Familiar](entry://familiar_rituals/familiar_chimera) and feed it a [](item://minecraft:golden_apple) to detach the [#](ad03fc)Goat[#](). Bring the goat to a [#](ad03fc)Forest Biome[#](). Then click the goat with [any Black Dye](item://minecraft:black_dye), [](item://minecraft:flint) and [](item://minecraft:ender_eye) to summon the [#](ad03fc)Shub Niggurath[#]().
How to bring back a stranger from the dead.

Occultists have discovered a way to capture part of the essence
 of any fallen enemy through an enchantment known as [#](55FF55)Fracture Soul[#]().
\
\
With a variation of the ritual to resurrect familiars,
 it is possible for a [](item://occultism:soul_shattered) to create a completely revived mob,
 forming its new body and trapping within it the shard's remaining soul.

An Iesnium Golem is a direct upgrade from a regular Iron Golem, this new version is much stronger and invulnerable. \
Only a player can dismiss them, by hitting while crouched, returning as a [](item://occultism:fragile_soul_gem).

The Iesnium Golem Chapter is part of the Familiar Category of this book because of the similarities, however a golem is not exactly a familiar since it does not have an owner.
\
\
As such, they also cannot be stored in a [](item://occultism:familiar_ring) or in a [](item://occultism:soul_gem). You can, however, dispense with them as stated on the previous page.

Familiar rituals summon spirits to aid the summoner directly. The spirits usually inhabit an animal's body, allowing them to resist essence decay. Familiars provide buffs, but may also actively protect the summoner.
Enterprising summoners have found a way to bind familiars into jewelry that passively applies their buff, the [Familiar Ring](entry://crafting_rituals/craft_familiar_ring).

"Familiars can be easily traded when in a [Familiar Ring](entry://crafting_rituals/craft_familiar_ring).
\
\
When released, the spirit will recognize the person releasing them as their new master.
Purify a Vex to an Allay on a resurrection process that reveals its true name.
How to bring back a familiar from the dead.

The resurrection is a relatively simple process. The soul shard is strengthened with [](item://occultism:otherworld_essence) until it is strong enough to allow the familiar to return to the mortal realm and create a new body for itself.
\
\
The essence is obtained by growing (lots of) Demons Dream plants.
Fruit and seeds can be mixed freely to create the essence.

If a familiar dies it does not merely return to the Otherworld. Due to the close connection to the summoner a splinter of the familiar's soul remains in the mortal realm.
\
\
This splinter - shard - can be used to re-summon the familiar more easily.
book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.get: In order to craft [#](ad03fc)Books of Binding[#]() to summon spirits, you also need awakened feather. Simply drop any feather into [](item://occultism:spirit_fire) to awakened it.
Add the name of the spirit to summon to your book of binding by crafting it with the Dictionary of Spirits. The Dictionary will not be used up.

Alternatively, you can directly use the Binding Book: Empty instead of the previous three items. There are two ways to obtain this book. Place this book in the center of dyes to get specific book of binding.
Craft a book of binding that will be used to call forth a [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() spirit.
Or how to identify your spirit

To call forth a spirit, a [#](ad03fc)Book of Binding[#]() must be used in the ritual.
There is a type of book corresponding to each type (or tier) of spirit.
To identify a spirit to summon, it's name must be written in the [#](ad03fc)Book of Binding[#](), resulting in a [#](ad03fc)Bound Book of Binding[#]() that can be used in the ritual.
Books of Binding
**Note:** *The spirit names are eye candy only*, that means they are not relevant for the recipe. As long as you have the right spirit type in your book of binding it can be used.
Books of Binding
In order to craft [#](ad03fc)Books of Binding[#]() to summon spirits, you need purified ink. Simply drop any black dye into [](item://occultism:spirit_fire) to purify it.
Lastly you need taboo book to craft [#](ad03fc)Books of Binding[#]() to summon spirits. Simply drop a book into [](item://occultism:spirit_fire) to get it.
Tips for using books of binding in Crafting Automation such as AE2 or RS

Bound Books of Binding are generated with a random spirit name. This tricks many automated crafting processes into no longer recognizing the item as the requested crafting result, because it does not expect NBT/Data Components on the item.
\
\
This leads to stuck crafting processes.
The Problem
Books of Binding in Automation

1. Put a dictionary of spirits into an anvil and give it a name. This will be the name of all spirits summoned in the future.
2. Use this dictionary to configure crafting patterns (if your automation mod requires it).
3. Use this dictionary to craft the Bound Books of Binding in the automation system. As usual, the dictionary will not be used up.
4. All crafted books will now have the same name and will be recognized by your automation system.
The Solution
Telling your spirits what to do

Books of Calling allow to control a summoned spirit, and to store it to prevent essence decay or move it more easily.
\
\
Only spirits that require precise instructions - such as a work area or drop-off storage - come with a book of calling.
Books of Calling
Books of Calling

If a summoned spirit supports the use of a Book of Calling, the summoning ritual will automatically spawn a book in the world alongside the spirit.
\
\
If you **lose the book**, there are also crafting recipes that just provide the book (without summoning a spirit).
How to obtain Books of Calling

The recipes can be found in this book or via JEI.
\
\
[#](ad03fc)Shift-right-click[#]() the spirit with the crafted book to assign it.

To store spirits that do not have a fitting book of calling, you can use a [Soul Gem](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals/craft_soul_gem).
Soul gems are much more versatile and allow to store almost all types of entities even animals and monsters, but not players or bosses.
Storing Spirits

- [#](ad03fc)Right-click[#]() air to open the configuration screen
- [#](ad03fc)Shift-right-click[#]() a block to apply the action selected in the configuration screen
- [#](ad03fc)Shift-right-click[#]() a spirit to capture it (must be of the same type)
- [#](ad03fc)Right-click[#]() with a book with a captured spirit to release it
Usage

You can automate this process placing a sacrificial bowl with [#](00AA00)Dictionary of Spirits[#]() above the [](item://minecraft:chiseled_bookshelf).
When the bowl receive a redstone signal, the books inside will be bounded.\
\
Note: Also work with copper and silver versions of the sacrificial bowl.
Automation
Bound your books with chiseled bookshelf

Crafting the bound books of binding is so boring? \
Use the Bookshelf Binding!
Make up to **SIX** bindings at the same time, with in-world interaction, no more the common shapeless recipe. \
\
Put the books in a [](item://minecraft:chiseled_bookshelf) and [#](AA00AA)Shift + Right Click[#]() with your [#](00AA00)Dictionary of Spirits[#]().
Five Star Bound Method

You can also bind [](item://occultism:book_of_binding_empty) directly, just hold 4 dyes for each in your off-hand. \
\
The spirit to be bound depends on the dye held:\
Blue    ->  Foliot\
Purple  ->  Djinni\
Yellow  ->  Afrit\
Green   ->  Marid
Dyeing the empties
Bookshelf Binding
Cleaning up!
Chalk is a pain to clean up, by [#](ad03fc)right-clicking[#]() with a brush you can remove it from the world much more easily.
Next Steps
Brush

You can use a dye and the [](item://occultism:large_candle) to mix then in shapeless craft process to get a colored large candle.
\
Available in all the 16 minecraft dyes.
Let there be light!

Свічки забезпечують стабільність ритуалів і є важливою частиною майже всіх кіл.
**Великі свічки також забезпечують силу чар, порівняну з книжковими полицями.**
\
\
Свічки з Minecraft та інших модифікацій можуть бути використані замість свічок Occultism.

Just like the candles from Minecraft, [](item://occultism:large_candle) and colored versions can be lit, turning in a great light source.
\
In addition, you can use a [](item://minecraft:torch), [](item://minecraft:soul_torch), [](item://minecraft:copper_torch), [](item://minecraft:redstone_torch) or [](item://occultism:spirit_torch) to change the type of fire.
\
Also can be waterlogged.
Candles

Key ingredient for large candles. Kill large animals like pigs, cows or sheep with a [](item://occultism:butcher_knife)
to harvest [](item://occultism:tallow).
Better chalks for better rituals!

Right-clicking on Spirit Fire with a Chalk will change the color of the flames.\
\
Dye dye dye, its muffin time.
Colored Spirit Fire

For more advanced rituals the basic [White Chalk](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/ritual_prep_chalk) is not sufficient. Instead chalks made from more arcane materials are required.
More Chalks
Follow the progression in [Pentacle page](category://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/pentacles) to get the 16 chalks and do all pentacles,
Pentacle Category
More Chalks
Infuse spirits into items to create powerful tools
Infusion rituals are all about crafting powerful items, by binding ("infusing") spirits into objects.The spirits will provide special functionality to the items.
Infusion Rituals
To find more about Infusing items, see the [Infusion Rituals](category://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals) Category.
Більше інформації
Infusion Rituals
Datura can be crushed by a Crusher spirit to produce seeds for replanting.
Crushing

Light up your space with [](block://occultism:spirit_lantern), [](block://occultism:spirit_campfire), and [](block://occultism:spirit_torch) -- decorative lighting made from [](item://occultism:datura) crop.
Healing crop for spirits and rituals
Right-click a spirit with datura to heal it. Works on Familiars, Summoned Spirits, and Possessed Mobs.
Healing Spirits
Datura
Throw datura to the ground and light it on fire with flint and steel to create a spirit fire.
Spirit Fire Fuel
When the Datura crop reaches maturity, the full-grown plant drops datura. Harvest it before it dies to collect.
Datura is a crop that can be grown like wheat. It has multiple uses in the mod.
Learn about the Otherworld and the Third Eye.

An additional side effect of Demon's Dream, is **the ability to interact with [#](ad03fc)Otherworld[#]() materials**.
This is unique to Demon's Dream, other ways to obtain [#](ad03fc)Third Eye[#]() do not yield this ability.
While under the effect of Demon's Dream you are able to **harvest** Otherstone as well as Otherworld trees.

Hidden from mere human eyes exists another plane of existence, another *dimension* if you will, the [#](ad03fc)Otherworld[#]().
This world is populated with entities often referred to as [#](ad03fc)Demons[#]().
The Otherworld

These Demons possess a wide variety of powers and useful skills, and for centuries magicians have sought to summon them for their own gain.
The first step on the journey to successfully summoning such an Entity is to learn how to interact with the Otherworld.
Lifting the Veil

**Підказка**: Потойбічні матеріали, які ви можете збирати з ефектом[#](ad03fc)Третього ока[#]() **можна отримувати легшим способом за допомогою [](item://occultism:spirit_fire)**. Перейдіть до наступного запису в цій книзі, щоб дізнатися більше про вогонь духів.
Fruit and seeds can be mixed freely to create the essence.

Demon's Dream is a herb that gives humans the [#](ad03fc)Third Eye[#](),
allowing them to see where the [#](ad03fc)Otherworld[#]() intersects with our own.
Seeds can be found **by breaking grass**.
**Consuming** the grown fruit activates the ability *with a certain chance*.

Multiple Demon's Dream fruits or seeds can be compressed into an essence that is much more potent. It *guarantees* the [#](ad03fc)Third Eye[#]() and provides it for a longer amount of time, but comes with a lot of (positive and negative) side effects.
The essence can be purified in spirit fire (more on that later!) to obtain a version free from all negative side effects, while retaining the positive.

The divination rod uses a spirit attuned gem attached to a wooden rod.
The gem resonates with the chosen material, and this movement is amplified by the wooden rod,
allowing to detect nearby Otherworld materials.    
    
    
The rod works by detecting resonance between real world and Otherworld materials.
Attuned the rod to a real world material, and it will find the corresponding Otherworld block.

An additional function of the Divination Rod is to locate any ore,
 however this is not a default function and needs to be enabled,
 as we recommend using the Greedy familiar or Theurgy mod for this type of divination.
 If you want to enable this feature directly in Occultism Divination Rod, check
 "Server Configuration > Items" and set "Divination c:ores" to "on".
Extra Config
Obtaining otherworld materials

Otherworld materials play an important role in interacting with spirits.
As they are rare and not visible to the naked eye, finding them requires special tools.
The divination rod allows to find Otherworld materials based on their similarities to materials common to our world.

White means nothing was found.
The more purple you see, the closer you are.

[#](ad03fc)Shift-right-click[#]() a block to attune the rod to the corresponding Otherworld block.
- [](item://minecraft:andesite): [](item://occultism:otherstone)
- [](item://minecraft:oak_wood):  [](item://occultism:otherworld_log)
- [](item://minecraft:oak_leaves): [](item://occultism:otherworld_leaves)
- [](item://minecraft:netherrack): [](item://occultism:iesnium_ore)

Then [#](ad03fc)right-click[#]() and hold until the rod animation finishes.
Use of the Rod

After the animation finishes, a particle will fly toward the closest found block.
Additionally you can watch the crystals for hints: a white crystal indicates no target blocks found,
a fully purple block means the found block is nearby. Mixes between white and purple show
that the target is rather far away.

[#](ad03fc)Right-clicking[#]() without holding after a successful search will send another particle toward the last found target block.
\
\
If you prefer the old target highlight, open occultism-client.toml and set useAlternativeDivinationRodRenderer = true.

To make it easier to get started, the materials obtained by divination now also have crafting recipes.
**If you want the full experience, skip the following recipe page and move on to the
[divination instructions](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/divination_rod@divination_rod).**

Otherworld Groves are lush, overgrown caves, with [#](ad03fc)Otherworld Trees[#](),

needs to get set up as a summoner.
To find them, attune your divination rod to Otherworld leaves
or logs, as unlike Otherstone, they only spawn in these groves.

**Hint:** In the Overworld, look **down**.

**Beware**: the tree growing from the sapling will look like a normal oak tree.
You need to activate the [Third Eye](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/demons_dream)
to harvest the Otherworld Logs and Leaves.

Otherworld trees grow naturally in Otherworld Groves. To the naked eye they appear as oak trees,
but to the Third Eye they reveal their true nature.    
**Important:** Otherworld Saplings can only be obtained by breaking the leaves manually, naturally only oak saplings drop.
Otherworld Trees

The black chalk has a composition as rigid as it is supernatural. Mixing the essence of
 Wither with netherite turns this chalk into an extremely valuable tool.

Perfect for the foundation of any pentacle, the power of the black chalk is sufficient

To obtain the essence of a [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() for [](item://occultism:chalk_blue) you need to
 [summon and kill an Unbound Marid](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/marid_essence).

Just as the red chalk is made from the essence of Afrit, the blue chalk is made

The Chalk of The Seven Seas

The purpose of the blue chalk is to overcome the willpower of a Marid; its sometimes
 excessive use serves as a guarantee that any Marid will be controlled.
 Should the control fail, it would generate extreme fury in the invoked Marid.

To obtain the [](item://occultism:cruelty_essence) for [](item://occultism:chalk_brown) you need to
 [summon and kill a Mercy Goat](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/possession_rituals/possess_goat)

The brown chalk is made with the essence of cruelty, and obtaining it certainly lives up
 to its name. Do the ends justify the means? Does morality truly exist? What is your morality?

This chalk is known to be part of an "Alignment Test." Anyone who possesses it is
 automatically classified as "Evil." What kind of spirits will these glyphs attract?

**Purpose:** Contact [#](AA00AA)Eldritch[#]()\
\
This strange pentacle uses forbidden knowledge, bringing together paraphernalia from ancient traditions.\
The level of power that can be achieved almost cheats the common reality.

**Purpose:** Contact [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]()\
\
**Osorins Unbound Calling** has a unique form, mixing different aspects obtained in each chalk
 and none of the common stabilizing paraphernalia. Therefore, the pentacle offers no protection
  to the occultist, but acts as an irresistible contact with the [#](AA00AA)Wild Spirits[#]().

**Purpose:** Bind [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]()\
\
First discovered by Grandmistress Sevira of Emberwoods, **Seviras Permanent Confinement** is used for
 binding [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() into objects. Due to the power of the spirits involved, this should be performed only by advanced summoners.

**Purpose:** Bind [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]()\
\
**Strigeors Higher Binding** is a pentacle for binding [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() into objects, should not be attempted by the
 novice summoner. Supported by skeleton skulls and stabilized by candles it is highly suitable for
 permanent infusions of objects with spirits.

**Purpose:** Bind [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]()\
\
As a simple binding pentacle, **Eziveus Spectral Compulsion** is a common starting point for object
 infusion with lower spirits. The enchantment is made permanent by stabilizing candles.

**Мета:** Пирв’язування [#](AA00AA)Маріда[#]()\
\
**Перегорнута вежа Апхаксаса** — це одне з кількох кіл, здатне прив’язати [#](AA00AA)Маріда[#]() до предметів.
 Будь-які ритуали, пов’язані з [#](AA00AA)Марідом[#]() повинні виконуватися лише найдосвідченішими викликачами.

Almost lost to time, the cyan chalk brings ancient knowledge, often even forbidden.
 But who cares? After all, knowledge is knowledge, and the more, the better, right?

Роздрібнення [#](FF55FF)уламка відлуння[#](), зберігаючи його властивості — це задача, яку можуть виконати лише кращі з дробильників.
\
Або ж ви можете вбити Боронителя [ієснієвим м’ясним ножем](item://occultism:iesnium_butcher_knife), щоб отримати цей пил.

Despite the complexity of its manufacture, this chalk is dated as one of the oldest,
 perhaps even the oldest chalk ever recorded. And even after all this time,
 its uses are little known, but you can see just how stable it is.

This category is a roadmap that guides you step by step, follow the unlocked entries.\
 \
**Tip:** By default, to set up all pentacles, you need four 19x19 areas.

This category is organized as a table.\
 Each line refers to a type of ritual.\
 And each column represents a tier.\
 By following the line you can just upgrade the pentacle you drew before,
 working like the previous and the new one.

The gray chalk is made with one of the magical pastes, making it an intermediate-level
 foundation chalk. Its magical properties can react in curious ways with the world around it.

The property of interacting with dusts can be combined with the powers of the [](item://occultism:nature_paste),
 holding the [](item://occultism:gray_paste) in the off-hand will allow you to interact with
 some minerals, making them grow and extracting extra resources from them.

This strange amorphous paste is mainly used to improve the foundation of your pentacles.
 But its secondary use can be very useful, some dusts react with portion of this matter
 and return to their original shape as before being crushed.

As an enhanced foundation chalk, it further strengthens the core of the pentacle and
 (almost always) can replace white glyphs or light gray glyphs.
The green chalk uses herbal concentrate to bring the energies of flora into the pentacles.
This connection with nature makes the green chalk ideal for attracting wild spirits.

The light blue chalk is made with such icy materials that its glyphs
 are inert and impart a natural stability to the pentacles.
Crushing ice without melting it is a job a Foliot can't do, so you'll need a better crusher.
Although it is basically made of ice, the magic present prevents it from melting.

The light gray chalk uses mineral compounds to enhance the foundation of a pentacle.
 The foundation is an important property, often considered the stabilization of the "core."

Due to its relatively low cost and inherent magical properties, it is the most common
 foundation option among practitioners of occultism, capable of replacing white chalk
 in almost all pentacles.

The lime chalk attracts greater spirits than Foliots.
 Anyone wishing to elevate the level of their rituals will need this chalk.

Made with valuable gems infused with experiences, lime glyphs become especially
 interesting to demonstrate that yours skills have surpassed the basic level.

All the power of a dragon in a single chalk: this is the marvel of the purple chalk.
 The relationship between spirits and dragons is unclear, but there may definitely be connections.

Ah, the energy of the end. But what end? Does an end truly exist?
 What concludes at the end? Will the end ever come to an end?

To obtain the [](item://occultism:cursed_honey) for [](item://occultism:chalk_orange) you need to
 [summon and kill a Possessed Bee](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/possession_rituals/possess_bee)

The orange chalk is a perfect bait for spirits of the Afrit class, who,
 although impressed by the lime chalk, can resist its call.

Being a sweet and slightly warm chalk, it does not guarantee control over the invoked Afrit.
 Commanding an Afrit requires power directly related to its class of spirits and
 extreme stability in the pentacle.

Candles increase the stability of the pentacle, thus allowing a slowed essence decay of the summoned
 spirit, leading to a longer lifetime of the spirit, or possessed object or being.

Crystals increase the stability of the pentacle, at levels that candles would not reach, allowing a performing more unstable rituals.\
\
Check the recipes in next page.
In addition to runes various occult paraphernalia are used to improve the intended effect of the pentacle.

Skulls increase the calling power of the pentacle, allowing to summon more dangerous spirits.\
\
Occultists can find an easy way to obtain these skulls using basic possession rituals.

Whiter Skulls are stronger than regular Skull, and increase a lot the calling power of the pentacle,
 allowing to summon more powerful class of spirits.\
\
Occultists can find an easy way to obtain these skulls using wild rituals.

The name [#](AA00AA)Pentacle[#]() in this context refers to ritual drawings of any shape, not just five-pointed stars. \
\
Pentacles are used to summon and bind spirits from [#](AA00AA)The Other Place[#]().

Each pentacle consists of a central golden ritual bowl, surrounding runes of various colors
 and occult paraphernalia that improve the intended effect in various ways.\
\
They act both as a device to call on the entity, an amplifier for the summoner's commanding power
 and as a protecting circle preventing attacks from within against the summoner.

The combination of chosen runes and supporting items as well as their exact spatial positioning
 determines the use and effectiveness of the pentacle.

Інгредієнти треба класти у [жертовні чаші](item://occultism:sacrificial_bowl)
 навколо ритуального кола. Зокрема, їх можна розміщувати **будь-де** в межах
 8 блоків по горизонталі від центральної [золотої жертовної чаші](item://occultism:golden_sacrificial_bowl).
 Точне розташування не має значення.

Made from the flesh of a pig possessed by an Afrit, this chalk possesses
 both animalistic properties and part of an Afrit's power.

Щоб отримати [](item://occultism:demonic_meat) для [рожевої крейди](item://occultism:chalk_pink) вам потрібно
 [викликати та вбити одержимого зомбованого піґліна](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/possession_rituals/possess_zombie_piglin)

Some occultists have reported that the demonic flesh keeps the chalk alive,
 resulting in strange movements. However, this has never been officially
 documented or proven, remaining merely rumors that may or may not be true.

**Purpose:** [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() Possession\
\
**Posuc Convocation** is a modified version in the possession geometry of [#](FF55FF)Abras Conjure[#]() that allows
 possessing entities, and thus summoning familiars.

**Purpose:** [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() Possession\
\
**Ihagans Enthrallment** forces [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() to possess a nearby Creature. This pentacle is very versatile
  for imprisonment, allowing you to summon more powerful Spirits and Creatures.

**Purpose:** [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() Possession\
\
**Hedyrins Lure** attracts [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() and forces them to possess a nearby Creature. This pentacle can
 perform basic possessions, bringing back only low-power Spirits and Possessed Creatures.

**Мета:** Одержимість [#](AA00AA)Маріда[#]()\
\
**Заклинання Зеоврента** — це потужне коло, що відкриває одержимість [#](AA00AA)Марідом[#]() у надзвичайно небезпечних ритуалах.

**Purpose:** [#](AA00AA)Unbound Afrit[#]() Possession\
\
**Odus Open Convocation** is a simplified version of [#](AA00AA)Posuc' Convocation[#](), allowing you to forces [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() to possess a nearby Creature without red chalk.
 Due to the very reduced power of the Pentacle its limited in use.

The purple chalk is extremely important for those wishing to perform infusions,
 serving as the main glyph in this type of ritual.

You do not need to visit the [#](FF55FF)The End[#]() to obtain Endstone. You can summon a
 [Possessed Endermite](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/possession_rituals/possess_endermite) which has a high chance to drop it.

Infusions are an extremely different type of ritual, as while summoning and possession
 bring living creatures into the world, infusion creates objects bound to spirits.

To obtain the essence of an [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() for [](item://occultism:chalk_red) you need to
 [summon and kill an Unbound Afrit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/afrit_essence).

The red chalk is made from the very essence of Afrit, making its glyphs directly
 connected to these spirits. Additionally, it elevates the pentacles
  capacity to the most demonic levels.

These properties allow for an incredible achievement that has been sought
 for ages before being attained: the summoning of an Afrit bound to the occultist.

**Purpose:** Resurrect a [#](AA00AA)Familiar[#]()\
\
**Susjes Simple Circle** is a simple pentacle that returns the physical form of a spirit that has
 been slaughtered, not needing much to do so.

**Purpose:** Summon a [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]()\
\
**Abras Conjure** is one of the few pentacles capable of (mostly) safely summoning an [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]().
 While the requirement of several [#](FF55FF)Spirit Attuned Gems[#]() makes it comparatively expensive,
 the additional calling potential is required to reach these high-power spirits.

**Purpose:** Summon a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]()\
\
Developed by [#](FF55FF)Ophyx[#]() during the Third Era, the [#](FF55FF)Calling[#]() is the go-to pentacle for [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() summonings ever since.
 Skeleton skulls ([Obtain here](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/possession_rituals/possess_skeleton))
 and [#](AA00AA)Lime Chalk[#]() provide the calling power required to force Djinni into appearance and candles stabilize the ritual.

**Purpose:** Summon a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]()\
\
Considered by most to be the simplest pentacle, [#](FF55FF)Aviars Circle[#]() is easy to set up,
 but provides only a minimum of binding power and protection for the summoner.\
\
Only the weakest [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() can be summoned in rituals using this pentacle.

**Purpose:** Summon a [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]()\
\
**Fatmas Incentivized Attraction** is a powerful pentacle, allowing you to summon and bind [#](AA00AA)Marids[#]()
 to your will.

**Purpose:** Summon an [#](AA00AA)Unbound Afrit[#]()\
\
**Kandars Open Conjure** is a simplified version of [#](FF55FF)Abras Conjure[#](), allowing to summon [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() without red chalk.
 Due to the much reduced power of the pentacle, it cannot be used to control [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#](),
 and it thus can only be used to fight and kill [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]().

**Purpose:** Summon an [#](AA00AA)Unbound Marid[#]()\
\
**Tibiras Attraction** is a improved version of [#](FF55FF)Abras Conjure[#](), allowing to summon [#](AA00AA)Marid[#](),
 however without any control of the occultist. [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() summoned by this will become
 aggressive due to the instability of the ritual

This is the first chalk in the journey of any occultist. Due to its simplicity, it serves as a
 weak foundation. Pentacles drawn only with this chalk attract only the weakest spirits,
 known as Folit.

In almost any pentacle where you see a white glyph, it can be replaced with another
 "colorless" chalk (light gray, gray, or black).

The yellow chalk, also known as golden chalk, brings a sparkle to the eyes of those who
 engage in possessions, serving as the main glyph in this type of ritual.

Possessions are a variation of summoning, caused by a transformation in geometry and
 the addition of yellow glyphs, allowing spirits to manifest in bodies (material prisons)
  different from their usual ones.

Silverfish summoned by this way can drop: [](item://minecraft:music_disc_relic), [](item://minecraft:host_armor_trim_smithing_template), [](item://minecraft:raiser_armor_trim_smithing_template), [](item://minecraft:shaper_armor_trim_smithing_template), [](item://minecraft:wayfinder_armor_trim_smithing_template), [](item://minecraft:burn_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:danger_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:friend_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:heart_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:heartbreak_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:howl_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:sheaf_pottery_sherd).
**Drops**: Items related to ruins trials (See next page);
Wild Horde Silverfish
Ритуали одержимості

Possession rituals bind spirits into living beings, giving the summoner a degree of control over the possessed being.
\
\
As such these rituals are used to obtain rare items without having to venture into dangerous places.
\
\
Possessed Mobs count as their vanilla counterparts for the ritual sacrifices purposes.
Ритуали одержимості
Ритуали одержимості

In this ritual an [#](ad03fc)djinni[#]() will possess an [#](ad03fc)Bee[#](), Be careful,
 a bee invoked by this way does not lose its stinger, always poison the target,
 attacks faster and can summon other bees when it takes damage.
 This is the only known method to obtain [](item://occultism:cursed_honey), eating will grants
 a short regeneration buff.\
 \
 If this bee enters a hive, the djinni will return to [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#]().
**Drops**: [](item://occultism:cursed_honey);
Possessed Bee

In this ritual a [#](ad03fc)Blaze[#]() is spawned with energy of [#](ad03fc)The Nether[#]() and immediately
possessed by the summoned [#](ad03fc)Djinni[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Blaze[#]() is immune to water and snowball!
\
Extra Drops:
\
Always one of [](item://minecraft:nether_wart), [](item://minecraft:crimson_fungus), [](item://minecraft:warped_fungus),
[](item://minecraft:red_mushroom), [](item://minecraft:brown_mushroom), [](item://minecraft:crimson_roots),
[](item://minecraft:warped_roots), [](item://minecraft:weeping_vines), [](item://minecraft:twisting_vines);

**Drops**: 2-6x [](item://minecraft:blaze_rod), 0-13x [](item://minecraft:blaze_powder)
and nether-related items (check next page);
Possessed Blaze

The [](item://minecraft:breeze_rod) from this enemy can survive after the battle and the extra loot is: [](item://minecraft:bolt_armor_trim_smithing_template), [](item://minecraft:guster_banner_pattern) and [](item://minecraft:music_disc_precipice).
**Drops**: 1x [](item://minecraft:ominous_trial_key) and can drop other things (See next page);
У палаці

У цьому ритуалі викликається [#](ad03fc)стародавній вартовий[#]() за допомогою життєвої сили [#](ad03fc)риби[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Афрітом[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Elder Guardian[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше one [](item://minecraft:nautilus_shell), having a chance to drop [](item://minecraft:heart_of_the_sea) and a lot of things that normal Elder Guardian drops.
Possessed Elder Guardian

У цьому ритуалі [#](ad03fc)Enderman[#]() is spawned using the life energy of a [#](ad03fc)Pig[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Джинні[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Enderman[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше one [](item://minecraft:ender_pearl) when killed.

**Drops**: 1-3x [](item://minecraft:ender_pearl)
and as 10%% chance to drop a [](item://minecraft:eye_armor_trim_smithing_template)
Possessed Enderman

У цьому ритуалі [#](ad03fc)ендерміта[#]() обманом змушують з’явитися. The stone and dirt represent the surroundings, then an egg is thrown to simulate the use of an ender pearl. When the mite spawns, the summoned [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() immediately possesses it, visits [#](ad03fc)The End[#](), and returns. The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Endermite[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше one [](item://minecraft:end_stone) when killed.

**Drops**: 1-2x [](item://minecraft:end_stone)
and as 25%% chance to drop an Eye
Possessed Endermite

In this ritual a [#](ad03fc)Ghast[#]() is spawned using the life energy of a [#](ad03fc)Cow[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Джинні[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Ghast[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше one [](item://minecraft:ghast_tear) when killed.

**Drops**: 1-3x [](item://minecraft:ghast_tear) and
1-4x [](item://minecraft:gunpowder)
Possessed Ghast

 Be sure of your actions, because they will forever mark your history.
**Drops**: [](item://occultism:cruelty_essence);
Goat of Mercy

harvesting energy from warm seas, corals are infused into the guardians internal structure.\
\
 Drops:
  + [](item://minecraft:sea_pickle) or [](item://minecraft:kelp);
  + [](item://minecraft:tube_coral), [](item://minecraft:brain_coral), [](item://minecraft:bubble_coral),
  [](item://minecraft:fire_coral), [](item://minecraft:horn_coral) (all also in block and fan version)
  + [](item://minecraft:prismarine_shard), [](item://minecraft:prismarine_crystals);
**Drops**: Every coral, prismarine and some sea plants;
Possessed Guardian

У цьому ритуалі викликається [#](ad03fc)гоґлін[#]() за допомогою життєвої сили [#](ad03fc)свині[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Афрітом[#](). Possessed Hoglin

У цьому ритуалі [#](ad03fc)Phantom[#]() is spawned using the life energy of a [#](ad03fc)Flying Passive Mob[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Фоліотом[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Phantom[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше one [](item://minecraft:phantom_membrane) when killed. Using this ritual is easy to trap the phantom and you can has comfy sleep.

and has 5%% chance to drop a [](item://minecraft:wind_charge)
Possessed Phantom

Different rituals can be performed, each with their own respective animals, check in the ritual dummy or in the recipe output the possibilities.
\
The animal can be interacted with as its natural counterpart, including taming, breeding and loot.
Summon Random Animal
Possessed Random Animal

Possessed Shulker

Possessed Skeleton

Unbound Drikwing

In this ritual a [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() is summoned **as an untamed spirit**.
\
\
The slaughter of a [#](ad03fc)Chicken[#]() and the offering of dyes are intended to entice the Foliot to take the shape of a parrot. As [#](ad03fc)Foliot[#]() are not among the smartest spirits, they sometimes misunderstand the instructions ...
*This means, if a [#](ad03fc)Chicken[#]() is spawned, thats not a bug, just bad luck!*
