Unbound Parrot

У цьому ритуалі [#](ad03fc)Warden[#]() is spawned using the life energy of a [#](ad03fc)Axolotl[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Афрітом[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Warden[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше six [](item://minecraft:echo_shard) when killed and as a chance to drop [](item://minecraft:disc_fragment_5), [](item://minecraft:music_disc_otherside), [](item://minecraft:silence_armor_trim_smithing_template), [](item://minecraft:ward_armor_trim_smithing_template). If you try to escape, this possessed Warden will go to the floor like a normal warden.

**Drops**: 6-9x [](item://minecraft:echo_shard)
and items related to ancient city;
Possessed Warden

[](item://minecraft:breeze_rod) cannot be obtained from Wild Weak Breeze rods due to their fragile nature, but this version of Breeze hides some treasures and має шанс скинути: [](item://minecraft:guster_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:scrape_pottery_sherd), [](item://minecraft:music_disc_creator_music_box) and [](item://minecraft:ominous_bottle).
**Drops**: 1x [](item://minecraft:trial_key) and can drop other things (See next page);
Перший ключ

У цьому ритуалі [#](ad03fc)Shulker[#]() is spawned using the life energy of a [#](ad03fc)Cube Mob[#]() та миттєво захоплюється викликаним [#](ad03fc)Джинні[#](). The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Weak Shulker[#]() завжди скидає щонайменше one [](item://minecraft:chorus_fruit) when killed and as a chance to drop [](item://minecraft:shulker_shell). You can use vanilla shulker multiplication to get normal shulkers with more chance to drop their shells.

**Drops**: 1-3x [](item://minecraft:chorus_fruit)
and as 10%% to drop a [](item://minecraft:shulker_shell);
Possessed Weak Shulker

In this ritual a [#](ad03fc)Witch[#]() is spawned using the rage energy from the [#](ad03fc)Cat[#]() death. The [#](ad03fc)Possessed Witch[#]() can drop a [](item://minecraft:experience_bottle), [](item://minecraft:honey_bottle), [](item://minecraft:ominous_bottle) or a simple water bottle.
**Drops**: Can drop: [](item://minecraft:experience_bottle) or other bottles (See next page);
Possessed Witch

У цьому ритуалі [#](ad03fc)afrit[#]() will possess an [#](ad03fc)Old Zombified Piglin[#](),
 unifying the energies of the [#](ad03fc)nether[#](), the power of the [#](ad03fc)afrit[#](),
  the material [#](ad03fc)pork[#]() and the concept of the color [#](ad03fc)pink[#]().
 This is the only known method to obtain [](item://occultism:demonic_meat), its properties
  prevent cooking but grant fire resistance to whoever consumes it.

**Drops**: 1-4x [](item://occultism:demonic_meat) and
  other body parts;
Possessed Zombified Piglin
Return to Rituals Category

You have learned how to attract groups of random animals by changing
 the pentacle to [#](ad03fc)Osorins Wild Calling[#]() and using a
 [](item://occultism:spirit_attuned_gem) instead of a bound book of binding.
Summon Group of Random Animal
Group of Random Animal

Besides venturing into nether dungeons, there is one more way to get these skulls. The legendary [#](ad03fc)Wild Hunt[#]() consists of [#](ad03fc)Greater Spirits[#]() taking the form of wither skeletons. While summoning the Wild Hunt is incredibly dangerous, it is the fastest way to get wither skeleton skulls.
Wither Skeleton Skull
Wild Hunt
book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.rit:
Some rituals require the use of certain items to be performed. Use the item described on the ritual's page within **16 blocks** of the [](item://occultism:golden_sacrificial_bowl) to proceed with the ritual.
\
\
**Important:** Before using the item, start the ritual. Grey particles indicate that the ritual is ready for the item use.

If a ritual shows grey particles above the golden ritual bowl, then additional requirements as described in the ritual's page need to be fulfilled. Once all requirements are fulfilled, the ritual will show purple particles and start to consume the items in the sacrificial bowls.

Rituals allow to summon spirits into our plane of existence, or bind them into objects or living beings. Every ritual consists of a [#](ad03fc)Pentacle[#](), [#](ad03fc)Ritual Ingredients[#]() provided via sacrificial bowls, a [#](ad03fc)Starting Item[#]() and optionally the [#](ad03fc)Sacrifice[#]() of living beings. A purple particle effect will show that the ritual is successful and in progress.

Rituals always follow the same steps:
- Draw the pentacle.
- Place a golden ritual bowl.
- Place sacrificial bowls.
- Put ingredients in bowls.
- [#](ad03fc)Right-click[#]()the golden bowl with the activation item.
- *Optional: Perform a sacrifice close to the center of the pentacle.*

Some rituals require the sacrifice of a living being to provide the necessary energy to summon the spirit. Sacrifices are described on the ritual's page under the "Sacrifice" subheading. To perform a sacrifice, kill an animal within 8 blocks of the golden ritual bowl. Only kills by players count as sacrifice!
book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.spi: Only trader, time and weather spirits are affected by essence decay, by default. All others are immune and will not despawn. Modpacks may modify this behaviour.

The summoner can slow or even stop essence decay by binding the spirit into an object, or summoning it into a living being. Additionally the pentacle used can influence the effects of essence decay to a degree.
Even the immortal are not immune to time.

When residing in our plane of existence, spirits experience [#](ad03fc)Essence Decay[#](), the slow rot of their "body". The more powerful the spirit, the slower the decay, but only the most powerful can stop it entirely. Once fully decayed they are returned to [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#]() and can only be re-summoned once fully recovered.
Even more powerful than Djinni, Afrit are used for the creation of major artifacts and the possession of powerful beings.

The most commonly summoned class. There is a great variety of Djinni, differing both in intelligence and power. Djinni can be used for a variety of task, ranging from higher artifacts over possession of living beings to carrying out tasks in their Chosen Form.
The lowest identified class of spirit. Equipped with some intelligence and a modicum of power they are most often used for manual labor or minor artifacts.
Spirits of power so great it is beyond measure. No summons have been attempted in living memory, and records of summonings in ancient times are mostly considered apocryphal.

[#](ad03fc)Spirit[#](), commonly referred to also as [#](ad03fc)Demon[#](), is a general term for a variety of supernatural entities usually residing in [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#](), a plane of existence entirely separate from our own.

The strongest identified class of spirits. Due to their power and vast intellect attempting a summoning is extremely dangerous and usually only carried out by the most experienced summoners, and even then usually in groups.
When in our world Spirits can take a variety of forms, by morphing their essence into [#](ad03fc)Chosen Forms[#](). Alternatively, they can inhabit objects or even living beings.

There are four major "ranks" of spirits identified by researchers, but there are a myriad spirits below and in between these ranks, and some great entities of terrible power, referred to only as [#](ad03fc)Greater Spirits[#](), that are beyond classification.

In ancient summoners had to research and experiment to find [#](ad03fc)True Names[#](). Some spirits can be convinced to share their knowledge of true names of other demons, either by promising a swift return to [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#](), or by more ... *persuasive* measures.

To summon a spirit the magician needs to know their [#](ad03fc)True Name[#](). By calling the true naming during the summoning ritual the Spirit is drawn forth from [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#]() and forced to do the summoners bidding.

*It should be noted, that it does not matter which spirit name is used in summoning, only the spirit tier is relevant.*

For your convenience, in this work you will find the known names of spirits of all 4 ranks, as well as some beyond that. To summon a spirit, copy their name from this book into the appropriate book of binding, then use this bound book of binding to activate a ritual.
Using Names to Summon a Spirit
Try not to lose your spirits!

Unbound summonings are the only way to obtain [Afrit Essence](entry://summoning_rituals/afrit_essence), a powerful substance required for crafting [](item://occultism:chalk_red) which is used for the most powerful binding pentacles.

Generally spirits are summoned [#](ad03fc)bound[#](), which refers to any condition that keeps them under control of the summoner. A side effect of binding spells is that part of the spirit remains in [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#](), robbing them of large portions of the power, but at the same time also protecting their essence from foreign access in this world.

In order to access a spirits essence, or unleash its full destructive power, it needs to be summoned [#](ad03fc)unbound[#](). Unbound summonings use pentacles that are intentionally incomplete or unstable, allowing to call on the spirit, but not putting any constraints on it.

The lack of restraints when summoning spirits unbound makes these rituals incredibly dangerous, but you may find that the rewards are worth the risk - and often there is no way around them to achieve certain results.
You better watch out, you better not cry ...

A group of legendary Greater Spirits, usually appearing in the form of wither skeletons, with their skeleton minions. The Greater Spirits are bound to their minions in such fashion that they are virtually invulnerable until their minions have been sent back to [#](ad03fc)The Other Place[#]().

While it is incredibly dangerous to call on the Wild Hunt, some summoners have been known to do so for quick access to the rare wither skeleton skulls they are known to leave behind. Summoning the wild hunt is described in detail on the page on obtaining [Wither Skeleton Skulls](entry://possession_rituals/wither_skull).
book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.sto:
Forging the [](item://occultism:storage_controller_stabilized) is one service provide by [#](AA00AA)Eldritch Spirits[#](),
 this block will helps occult masters twist space, placing the stabilizers in the same
 position as the actuator in some extra-planar dimension invisible even to the best eyes.\
 By default this item receives two bonus stabilizer tier 5\
 Other external stabilizers do not affect this block.\
 The recipe keep items inside!

This simple storage stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 1 Stabilizer adds **64** item types and 512000 items storage capacity.

This improved stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 2 Stabilizer adds **128** item types and 1024000 items storage capacity.

This advanced stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 3 Stabilizer adds **256** item types and 2048000 items storage capacity.

This highly advanced storage stabilizer is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() that supports the dimensional matrix
 in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 4 Stabilizer adds **512** item types and 4098000 items storage capacity.

The stable wormhole allows access to a dimensional matrix from a remote destination.
\
\
Shift-click a [](item://occultism:storage_controller) to link it, then place the wormhole in the world to use it as a remote access point.

The [](item://occultism:storage_remote) can be linked to a [](item://occultism:storage_controller) by shift-clicking.
 The [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() bound to the accessor will then be able to
 access items from the actuator even from across dimensions.

Every summoner knows the problem: There are just too many occult paraphernalia lying around.
 The solution is simple, yet elegant: Magic Storage!
\
\
Using Spirits able to access storage dimensions it is possible to create almost unlimited storage space.

Follow the steps shown in this category to get your own storage system!
 The steps related to storage in [Binding Rituals](category://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals) show only the rituals,
 while here **all required steps** including crafting are shown.

This extremely advanced stabilizer maybe is inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Ancient Spirit[#]() that supports
 the dimensional matrix in keeping the storage dimension stable, thus allowing to store even more items.
\
\
By default each Tier 5 Stabilizer adds **1024** item types and 8196000 items storage capacity.

The item type amount and storage size can be configured in the
 "[#](AA00AA)occultism-server.toml[#]()" config file in the save directory of your world.

This is the actual block that works as a storage, make sure to craft it!
 Placing just the [](item://occultism:storage_controller_base) from the previous step wont work.

The [](item://occultism:storage_controller) consists of a [Dimensional Matrix](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals/craft_dimensional_matrix) inhabited by a [#](AA00AA)Djinni[#]() that creates and manages a storage dimension,
 and a [Base](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals/craft_storage_controller_base) infused with a [#](AA00AA)Foliot[#]() that moves items in and out of the storage dimension.

For other mods the storage controller behaves like a shulker box, anything that can
 interact with vanilla chests and shulker boxes can interact with the storage controller.
 Devices that count storage contents may have trouble with the stack sizes.

Breaking the storage controller will store all contained items in the dropped item, you will not lose anything.
 The same applies to breaking or replacing Storage Stabilizers (you will learn about these later).
 \
 \
 Like in a shulker box, your items are safe!

The storage controller holds up to **128** different types of items
 (_You will learn later how to increase that_). Additionally it is limited to 256000 items in total.
 It does not matter if you have 256000 different items or 256000 of one item, or any mix.

Items with unique properties ("NBT data"), such as damaged or enchanted equipment will take up
 one item type for each variation. For example two wooden swords with two different damage values
 take up two item types. Two wooden swords with the same (or no) damage take up one item type.

After crafting the [](item://occultism:storage_controller) (see following pages), place it in the world and [#](55FF55)right-click[#]() it with an empty hand.
 This will open the GUI of the storage controller, from there on it will work much like a very big [](item://minecraft:shulker_box).

Стабілізатори сховища повинні цілитися на [вимірну матрицю](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/crafting_rituals/craft_dimensional_matrix), що значить **один блок над [задіювачем сховища](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/storage/storage_controller)**.
 \
 \
 Їх можна розміщувати на відстані **до 5 блоків** від вимірної матриці, та повинні бути
 на прямій лінії видимості. Дивіться наступну сторінку для ознайомлення з прикладом дуже простої устави.

The stabilizer system works by tier, starting from 0 (which does not add space) up to 5.
\
\
To get started, see the recipes and instructions on the following pages.

**Note:** You do not need all 4 stabilizers, even one will increase your storage.
 In addition, the up and down directions also work.

Стабілізатори сховища збільшують простір сховища у вимірі сховища задіювача сховища.
 З підвищенням рівня стабілізатора зростає забезпечуваний ним вміст.
 Наступні сторінки покажуть як створювати стабілізатори кожного рівня.

Ви можете **безпечно руйнувати стабілізатори сховища**, щоб покращити їх. Предмети
 у [задіювачі сховища](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/storage/storage_controller) не випадуть — ви лише не зможете покласти нові,
 поки не встановите стабілізатори достатньої кількості та рівня, щоб повернути вільні слоти.
Введення та виведення предметів із задіювача сховища

Виведення предметів може спричинити проблеми з продуктивністю, особливо при використанні фільтрованих
 труб, тому що вони обшукують усе величезне сховище цілком при кожній операції.
 \
 \
 Щоби *значно* підвищити продуктивність, використовуйте духів-перевізників для витягування речей з
 задіювача сховища або стабільної червоточини. Навіть якщо дух складатиме предмети у скриню,
 прилеглу до системи сховища, і труба витягуватиме з цієї скрині,
 продуктивність буде **набагато** вищою, ніж якби труба витягувала зі сховища безпосередньо.

Для введення предметів вам не потрібно робити додаткових дій, задіювач сховища
 здатний приймати предмети у собі вже максимально ефективно. Можна безпечно вводити предмети із
 великою кількістю та швидкістю без негативного впливу на продуктивність гри.

Задіювач сховища поводить себе здебільшого як велика скриня чи шалкерова коробка.
 Це означає, що лійки та труби можуть безперешкодно передавати крізь нього предмети.

Due to the potentially huge amount of items in the storage system,
 it is good to consider some performance aspects, otherwise your
 system might slow down your game or even a server you are playing on.
Передача предметів через задіювач сховища логістикою Theurgy

Once again, item extraction is the critical issue for performance.
\
\
To make use of the performance optimization, use a [](item://theurgy:logistics_item_extractor)
 and apply a [](item://theurgy:list_filter) to extract the desired items.
\
\
The Theurgy Guidebook "The Hermetica" has a chapter on Theurgy
 mercurial logistics and how to use them to insert and extract items.

Як і духи-перевізники, система ртутної логістики Theurgy
 оптимізована для роботи із задіювачем сховища та стабільними червоточинами.

If you lose the book of calling, you can craft a new one.
[#](55FF55)Shift-right-click[#]() the spirit with the crafted book to assign it.

Оператор машин передає предмети, визначені в інтерфейсі вимірного
 задіювача сховища, до своєї керованої машини, та повертає результати
 обробки у систему сховища. Його також можна використати для автоматичного
 збутку предметів зі скрині у задіювач сховища.
 \
 По суті, це вироблення на замовлення!

To use the machine operator use the book of calling to link a Storage
  Actuator, the machine and optionally a separate extract location
  (the face you click on will be extracted from!). For the machine
  you can additionally set a custom name and the insert/extract facings.

Please note that setting a new machine (or configuring it with
 the book of calling) will reset the extraction settings.
 \
 \
 For an easy start, make sure to view the short
 [Tutorial Video](https://gyazo.com/237227ba3775e143463b31bdb1b06f50)!

Use the book of calling to set the actuator, managed machine and extract locations of the machine operator.
 \
 \
 See [Books of Calling](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/books_of_calling) for more information.
book.occultism.dictionary_of_spirits.sum:
[](item://occultism:afrit_essence) is required to safely call on the more powerful spirits, commonly used
 in the form of red chalk. To obtain the essence, an [#](AA00AA)Afrit[#]() needs to be summoned
 unbound into this plane, and killed. Be warned that this is no simple endeavour,
 and unbound spirit presents great danger to all nearby.

[](item://occultism:marid_essence)  is required to safely control the most powerful spirits, commonly used
 in the form of blue chalk. To obtain the essence, an [#](AA00AA)Marid[#]() needs to be summoned
 unbound into this plane, and killed. Be warned that this is no simple endeavour,
 and unbound spirit presents great danger to all nearby.

Summon rituals force spirits to enter this world in their chosen shape, leading
 to little restrictions on their power. Summoned spirits range from trade spirits
 that trade and convert items, to slave-like helpers for manual labour.

If you lose the book of calling, you can craft a new one.
[#](55FF55)Shift-right-click[#]() the spirit with the crafted book to assign it.

The janitor will pick up dropped items and deposit them into a target
inventory.
If the filter slot is empty, the janitor will pick up everything in its work area.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to control which items it picks up instead.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details and recipes.

To bind the janitor to an inventory simply sneak and interact
with the janitor book of calling on that inventory. You can
also interact with a block while holding the janitor book of
calling to have it deposit items there. You can also have it
wander around a select area by pulling up that interface.

The Janitor will pick up crushed items from a [Crusher](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_crusher_t1), [Smelter](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_smelter_t1), [Crystallizer](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_crystallizer_t1)
spirits and deposit them into a chest.
\
\
Combine that with a [Transporter Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_transport_items) to automate the whole process.

Use the book of calling to set the work area and deposit location of the janitor.
 \
 \
 See [Books of Calling](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/books_of_calling) for more information.

Crusher spirits are summoned to crush ores into dusts, effectively multiplying the metal output.
   They will pick up appropriate ores and drop the resulting dusts into the world.
   A spark particle effect and a crushing sound indicate the crusher is at work.

To ease automation, try summoning a [Transporter Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_transport_items) to place items from chests
 in the crusher's inventory, and a [Janitor Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_cleaner) to collect the processed items.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The foliot crusher is the most basic crusher spirit.
 \
 \
 It will crush **one** ore into **two** corresponding dusts.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The djinni crusher is faster, more efficient and proficient than the foliot crusher.
Allowing ice to be crushed without melting.
\
It will crush **one** ore into **three** corresponding dusts.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The afrit crusher is faster and more efficient than the djinni crusher.
\
\
It will crush **one** ore into **four** corresponding dusts.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The marid crusher is faster, more efficient and proficient than the afrit crusher.
Allowing crushing the echo shard while maintaining its properties.
\
It will crush **one** ore into **six** corresponding dusts.

Crystallizer spirits are summoned to regenerate gem from their dusts and directly multiply
the output of breaking gem ores. They will pick up appropriate items and drop the resulting into
the world. A magical particle effect and a amethyst sound indicate the crystallizer is at work.

To ease automation, try summoning a [Transporter Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_transport_items) to place items from chests in the
 crystallizer's inventory, and a [Janitor Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_cleaner) to collect the processed items.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The foliot crystallizer is the most basic crystallizer spirit.
\
\
It will crystallize in a very low speed.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The djinni crystallizer is faster and more efficient, doubling the speed of processing and increasing the output amount from gem ores.
\
\
They also can deconstruct amethyst and quartz blocks.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The afrit Crystallizer is more faster and efficient.
\
\
They also can re-materialize crushed blocks.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The marid crystallizer is extremely faster and efficient in gem ore multiplier.
\
\
They also can transform amethyst cluster in budding amethyst and obsidian in crying obsidian.

If you lose the book of calling, you can craft a new one.
[#](55FF55)Shift-right-click[#]() the spirit with the crafted book to assign it.
Grandpa will return at the dawn of the 3rd year.

The farmer will harvest and re-plant crops in it's working area.
 If a deposit location is set it will collect the dropped items into the specified chest.

Use the book of calling to set the work area and deposit location of the farmer.
 \

  \

The lumberjack will harvest trees in it's working area.
 If a deposit location is set it will collect the dropped
 items into the specified chest, and re-plant saplings.

Summoning the lumberjack requires a [Stable Otherworld Sapling](item://occultism:otherworld_sapling). You can obtain it by summoning an [Otherworld Sapling Trader](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_otherworld_sapling_trader).

Оператор машин передає предмети, визначені в інтерфейсі вимірного
 задіювача сховища, до своєї керованої машини, та повертає результати
 обробки у систему сховища. Його також можна використати для автоматичного
 збутку предметів зі скрині у задіювач сховища.
 \
 По суті, це вироблення на замовлення!

To use the machine operator use the book of calling to link a Storage
  Actuator, the machine and optionally a separate extract location
  (the face you click on will be extracted from!). For the machine
  you can additionally set a custom name and the insert/extract facings.

Please note that setting a new machine (or configuring it with
 the book of calling) will reset the extraction settings.
 \
 \
 For an easy start, make sure to view the short
 [Tutorial Video](https://gyazo.com/237227ba3775e143463b31bdb1b06f50)!

Use the book of calling to set the actuator, managed machine and extract locations of the machine operator.
 \
 \
 See [Books of Calling](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/books_of_calling) for more information.

The Otherrock Trader spirit allows to get more [](item://occultism:otherrock) than using [](item://occultism:spirit_fire).
 Thus it is especially efficient if you want to use Otherrock as a building material.

To trade, drop your offered item next to the trader,
he will pick it up and drop the exchanged item.

The Otherstone Trader spirit allows to get more [](item://occultism:otherstone) than using [](item://occultism:spirit_fire).
Thus it is especially efficient if you want to use Otherstone as a building material.

To trade, drop your offered item next to the trader,
he will pick it up and drop the exchanged item.
You don't need to break the unstable tree with a pick

Otherworld Trees grown from natural Otherworld Saplings can only be harvested
when under the effect of [#](AA00AA)Third Eye[#](). To make life easier, the Otherworld Sapling Trader
will exchange such natural saplings for a stable variant that can be harvested
by anyone, and will drop the same stable saplings when harvested.

To trade, drop your offered item next to the trader,
he will pick it up and drop the exchanged item.

Smelter spirits are summoned to do furnace, blast furnace, smoker and campfire process,
without using fuel. They will pick up appropriate items and drop the resulting into the world.
A fire particle effect and a flame sound indicate the smelter is at work.

To ease automation, try summoning a [Transporter Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_transport_items) to place items from chests
 in the smelter's inventory, and a [Janitor Spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_cleaner) to collect the processed items.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.

The foliot smelter is the most basic smelter spirit.
\
\
It will smelt an item at the same speed as the furnace.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.
The djinni smelter is faster, doubling the speed of processing.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.
The afrit smelter is more faster, doing the process in a tenth of the time.

This spirit already only picks up items it has recipes for.
Put a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into its filter slot to further restrict which valid inputs it will take.
See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for filter details.
The marid smelter is extremely faster, doing the process in one percent of the time.

If you lose the book of calling, you can craft a new one.
[#](55FF55)Shift-right-click[#]() the spirit with the crafted book to assign it.

The transporter is useful in that you don't need a train of hoppers
transporting stuff, and can use any inventory to take from and deposit.
\
\
To make it take from an inventory simply sneak and interact
with it's book of calling on the inventory you want.

You can also dictate which inventory it deposits to in the same way.
\
The transporter will move all items it can access from one inventory to another,
 including machines. It can also deposit into the inventories of other spirits.
 By setting the extract and insert side they can be used to automate various transport tasks.

Shift-click the transporter to open the config UI.
The filter slot accepts a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter), which control what the transporter extracts or inserts.
A transporter without a filter will move any items it can reach. See [Spirit Filters](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/transporter_filters) for details and recipes.

The Transporter can also interact with the inventories of other spirits.
This is especially useful to automatically supply a [Crusher spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_crusher_t1) with items to crush,
a [Smelter spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_smelter_t1) with items to smelt or a [Crystallizer spirit](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/summoning_rituals/summon_crystallizer_t1) with items to crystallize.

Use the book of calling to set the extract and insert location of the transporter.
 \
 \
 See [Books of Calling](entry://occultism:dictionary_of_spirits/getting_started/books_of_calling) for more information.

The true form of this merchant will only be revealed with [#](AA00AA)Third Eye[#]() or [](item://occultism:otherworld_goggles),
 otherwise, he is identical to a common Wandering Trader,
 perhaps you have already encountered one without realizing it.
 \
 \
 The first time you interact with him, mundane sales are always shown.
 These vendors love trying to sell everything they have.
Sadly, it's not time in a bottle, a temporal pouch, or any other such device.

Time magic is limited in scope, it cannot send the magician back
 or forth in time, but rather allows to change the time of day.
 This is especially useful for rituals or other tasks requiring day
 or nighttime specifically.
\
\
Time spirits will only modify the time once and then vanish.

Trade spirits pick up appropriate items and throw trade results on the ground.
The spirit is only actively exchanging items if purple particles spawn around it.
\
\
**If you do not see any particles**, ensure that you gave the proper item and amount.
Most trade spirits experience extreme essence decay and will return to [#](AA00AA)The Other Place[#]() quickly.

A [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) matches by properties instead of exact items.
Use it for broader rules such as tags or other shared item attributes when one list would be too long.
This is useful for groups like all ores, all logs, or all outputs from one mod.

Spirits that pick up or extract items can use filter item to determine which items to take/process.
Put either a [](item://occultism:list_filter) or [](item://occultism:attribute_filter) into the filter slot in the spirit UI.

A [](item://occultism:list_filter) matches specific items you place into it.
Use it when you want an exact allow/block list, and switch its mode to decide whether matching items are allowed or blocked.
This is the best choice when you know the exact stacks a spirit should move.
Right-click with a filter item to open the UI, then configure the filter as desired.

Weather magic is especially useful for farmers and others depending
on specific weather. Summons spirits to modify the weather.
Different types of weather modification require different spirits.
\
\
Weather spirits will only modify the weather once and then vanish.

§lНе знайдено жертовні чаші.§r
Спочатку розмістіть жертовні чаші біля кола, чорні крапки показують можливі місця розташування. Він приймає версії з іншокаменю та іншоскелі, у чистих, мідних та срібних варіаціях.
